# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

//CPU architecture to optimize for. Using an incorrect setting
// here can result in crashes of the resulting binary because of
// invalid instructions used. Setting the value to "auto" will
// try to optimize for the architecture where cmake is called.
// Other supported values are: "none", "generic", "core", "merom"
// (65nm Core2), "penryn" (45nm Core2), "nehalem", "westmere",
// "sandy-bridge", "ivy-bridge", "haswell", "broadwell", "skylake",
// "skylake-xeon", "kaby-lake", "cannonlake", "icelake", "silvermont",
// "goldmont", "knl" (Knights Landing), "atom", "k8", "k8-sse3",
// "barcelona", "istanbul", "magny-cours", "bulldozer", "interlagos",
// "piledriver", "AMD 14h", "AMD 16h", "zen", "zen3", "x86-64",
// "x86-64-v2", "x86-64-v3", "x86-64-v4".
TARGET_ARCHITECTURE:STRING=auto

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for TBB.
TBB_DIR:PATH=/home/its/QC_QA_Team/sw/slc9_x86-64/TBB/v2021.5.0-24/lib/cmake/TBB

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for Threads.
Threads_DIR:PATH=Threads_DIR-NOTFOUND

USE_AVX:BOOL=TRUE

USE_AVX2:BOOL=FALSE

USE_AVX512BW:BOOL=FALSE

USE_AVX512CD:BOOL=FALSE

USE_AVX512DQ:BOOL=FALSE

USE_AVX512ER:BOOL=FALSE

USE_AVX512F:BOOL=FALSE

USE_AVX512IFMA:BOOL=FALSE

USE_AVX512PF:BOOL=FALSE

USE_AVX512VBMI:BOOL=FALSE

USE_AVX512VL:BOOL=FALSE

USE_BMI2:BOOL=FALSE

USE_FMA:BOOL=FALSE

USE_FMA4:BOOL=FALSE

//Use GNU's libmvec for vectorized sine and cosine
USE_LIBMVEC:BOOL=OFF

USE_SSE2:BOOL=TRUE

USE_SSE3:BOOL=TRUE

USE_SSE4_1:BOOL=TRUE

USE_SSE4_2:BOOL=TRUE

USE_SSE4a:BOOL=FALSE

USE_SSSE3:BOOL=TRUE

USE_XOP:BOOL=FALSE

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for Vc.
Vc_DIR:PATH=/home/its/QC_QA_Team/sw/slc9_x86-64/Vc/1.4.5-5/lib/cmake/Vc

//Force the Vc implementation globally to the selected instruction
// set. "auto" lets Vc use the best available instructions.
Vc_IMPL:STRING=auto

//Path to a library.
Vc_LIB_MVEC:FILEPATH=/usr/lib64/libmvec.so

//Path to a program.
Vc_lsb_release:FILEPATH=Vc_lsb_release-NOTFOUND

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for Vtune.
Vtune_DIR:PATH=Vtune_DIR-NOTFOUND

_last_target_arch:STRING=auto

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for absl.
absl_DIR:PATH=/home/its/QC_QA_Team/sw/slc9_x86-64/abseil/20240722.0-2/lib/cmake/absl

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for benchmark.
benchmark_DIR:PATH=benchmark_DIR-NOTFOUND

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for boost_atomic.
boost_atomic_DIR:PATH=/home/its/QC_QA_Team/sw/slc9_x86-64/boost/v1.83.0-alice2-44/lib/cmake/boost_atomic-1.83.0

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for boost_chrono.
boost_chrono_DIR:PATH=/home/its/QC_QA_Team/sw/slc9_x86-64/boost/v1.83.0-alice2-44/lib/cmake/boost_chrono-1.83.0

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for boost_container.

# INTERNAL cache entries
########################
